channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Extreme heat expected again at the Grand Canyon after 3 hikers die in heat-related incidents
item.description: Visitors to Grand Canyon National Park are being warned about extreme heat early next week. The U.S.

item.title: Trump tries to blame Reflecting Pool woes on vandalism, without offering substantiation
Utah marks a year of battling measles, with no clear end in sight
